info.name: Huawei FusionSolar Northbound (Basic)
info.description:
Northbound Open API: login via thirdData/login, then plant KPIs (status) via getStationRealKpi.

**Setup:** Import the matching environment and set `baseUrl` to the same regional host you use in the browser (e.g. `https://eu5.fusionsolar.huawei.com`). Run **Login** first; the collection test script stores `xsrf-token` into `xsrfToken`. Use **Get station list** to copy `plantCode` / `stationCode` for your plant into the `stationCodes` variable, then call **Get station real KPI (status)**.

**Auth:** `userName` + `systemCode` (Northbound account password). Subsequent calls need header `xsrf-token`.

**References:** Huawei SmartPVMS / FusionSolar Northbound API documentation (Basic APIs).

exec: console.warn("No xsrf-token header; check response and regional baseUrl.");

request.description: Obtains session token. Response header `xsrf-token` is saved to environment variable `xsrfToken`.

Lists plants available to this Northbound user. `pageNo` and `pageSize` are both required by many regions. Copy the `plantCode` (or `stationCode`) for your plant into environment variable `stationCodes`. For multiple plants, use comma-separated codes.
Real-time plant KPIs (power, energy, health state, etc.). Requires `stationCodes` from the station list.
